items.name: PDF Toolkit
items.summary: Anthropic skill for PDF read/merge/split/OCR workflows.
items.description: Use this skill for reading, extracting, combining, splitting, rotating, and OCR processing for PDF files.
items.author: Anthropic

install.command: npx skild install anthropics/skills/skills/pdf --target agents --local --skill pdf

summaryI18n.en: Anthropic skill for PDF read/merge/split/OCR workflows.
summaryI18n.zh: Anthropic 技能，用于 PDF 读取/合并/拆分/OCR 工作流。

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill for reading, extracting, combining, splitting, rotating, and OCR processing for PDF files.
descriptionI18n.zh: 使用该技能可读取、提取、合并、拆分、旋转并对 PDF 执行 OCR 处理。
